PRESENT:PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, AND DEFENDANT TERRANCE KIRKSEY, PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY SEPT 15,1994 9:00PM, LOCATED AT 405C COLE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA.
